_description: Table calculation with Compute Using configuration. The table-calc node goes inside the column-instance in datasource-dependencies, NOT at the worksheet level.

calc_field_in_datasource._description: Step 1: Define the calculated field in the datasource columns section

column_instance_with_table_calc._description: Step 2: Add column-instance in datasource-dependencies with table-calc child for Compute Using
column_instance_with_table_calc._placement: Inside worksheet > table > view > datasource-dependencies > datasource-dependency

notes.column_instance_naming: usr: prefix (User derivation), :2 suffix (table calc instance ID)
notes.CRITICAL: table-calc config MUST be in the column-instance in datasource-dependencies. Worksheet-level table-calculations section gets STRIPPED by loadMetadataFromXml.
